---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

## 📝 Feature Summary

<!-- A short, clear summary of the feature you're proposing. -->

## ❓ Problem or Motivation

<!-- What problem does this solve? Who is affected? Why is this valuable to Soroban Playground users?
Example: "As a developer deploying contracts to Testnet, I find it hard to... because..." -->

## 💡 Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe the solution you'd like. Be as specific as possible about the expected behavior,
UI changes, API changes, or new components involved. -->

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

<!-- Have you considered any alternative solutions or workarounds? Why was this approach preferred? -->

## Mockups or Examples (optional)

<!-- Add sketches, diagrams, links to similar tools, or any visuals that help illustrate the idea. -->

## 🧩 Affected Areas

- [ ] Code Editor
- [ ] Deployment or Testnet
- [ ] Contract Interaction
- [ ] UI/UX
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ]  Other: <!-- describe -->

## 📊 Impact & Priority (your assessment)

| Dimension | Assessment |
|-----------|------------|
| Who benefits? | e.g. All users / Smart contract beginners / Power users |
| Effort estimate | e.g. Small / Medium / Large |
| Breaking change? | Yes / No |

## 🔗 Related Issues or References
<!-- Link any related issues or external references -->

## ✅ Checklist for you to follow as a contributor.

- [ ] I have searched for existing issues and this is not a duplicate
- [ ] I have clearly described the problem this feature solves
- [ ] I have considered and noted alternative approaches
- [ ] This feature aligns with the project's goal of being a browser-based Soroban IDE
- [ ] I am willing to help implement or test this feature (optional)
